name: MemOS Local
description: Reflect2Evolve memory plugin with L1 traces, L2 policies, L3 world models, skill crystallization, and three-tier retrieval.

memory_search.description: Control whether MemOS Local exposes and performs memory_search.

enabled.description: Enable memory_search tool registration and automatic turn-start retrieval.

memory_add.description: Control whether MemOS Local writes conversation turns into memory.
